title:
Lesson 1:
Where do you live?
description: 'Yaşamak' (to live): 'Yaşıyorum' = I live, 'Yaşıyorsun' = you live. 'Nerede?' = Where? Important for location questions.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I live in Istanbul. And you?

title:
Lesson 2:
Transportation
description: Transportation: otobüs (bus), tren (train), araba (car), bisiklet (bicycle), taksi (taxi), metro (subway).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: How do you get to work?

title:
Lesson 3:
Directions
description: Direction words: sağ (right), sol (left), düz (straight), yakın (near), uzak (far).

title:
Lesson 4:
Asking for help
description: 'Yardım etmek' (to help): 'Yardım eder misiniz?' = Can you help? 'Yardıma ihtiyacım var' = I need help. Polite phrases.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Of course, what do you need?

title:
Lesson 5:
At the hotel
description: Hotel vocabulary: oda (room), rezervasyon (reservation), anahtar (key), resepsiyon (reception).

title:
Lesson 6:
This Way / That Way
description: 'Bu taraftan' = this way / from this side. 'O taraftan' = that way / from that side. 'Sağa' = to the right. 'Sola' = to the left. Essential for giving and understanding directions.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Excuse me, how can I get to the bank?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Then right, the bank will be on the left.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Hayır hayır. Bu taraftan daha hızlı.
dialogue.english: No no. This way is faster.

title:
Lesson 7:
Turn Right / Turn Left
description: 'Sağa dön' = Turn right. 'Sola dön' = Turn left. 'Dönmek' = to turn. These are essential for following directions in Turkish.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I'm lost. Can you show me the way?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Tabii. Bir sonraki sokakta sağa dön.
dialogue.english: Of course. Turn right at the next street.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Evet. Sonra trafik ışığında sola dön.
dialogue.english: Yes. Then turn left at the traffic light.
